criteria.confirmed_near_duplicate: same substantive item or copied wording; source prefix, encoding, hashtag order, or attribution may differ
criteria.related_not_duplicate: same topic/event but materially different fact, update, publisher report, or product post
criteria.template_not_duplicate: shared boilerplate with a different event, identifier, named entity, or destination
criteria.mask_policy: only confirmed_near_duplicate rows are proposed for the robust evaluation mask
